title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
